CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS geo (geom Geometry) ENGINE = Memory();
INSERT INTO geo VALUES ((0, 0));
INSERT INTO geo VALUES ((100, 100));
INSERT INTO geo VALUES ((-100, -100));
INSERT INTO geo VALUES ((NULL));
INSERT INTO geo VALUES ((1, 2.5));
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS geo_dst (geom Geometry) ENGINE = Memory();
INSERT INTO geo_dst SELECT geom FROM geo WHERE geom IS NOT NULL;
SELECT geom FROM geo_dst WHERE geom = ((0,0));
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM geo_dst;
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS geo_complex (id Int, geom Geometry) ENGINE = Memory();
INSERT INTO geo_complex VALUES (1, 'POLYGON((0 0, 5 0, 5 5, 0 5, 0 0))');
INSERT INTO geo_complex VALUES (2, 'POINT(2.5 2.5)');
INSERT INTO geo_complex VALUES (3, 'LINESTRING(0 0, 5 5)');
INSERT INTO geo_complex VALUES (4, 'MULTIPOLYGON(((0 0,10 0,10 10,0 10,0 0)),((1 1,2 1,2 2,1 2,1 1)))');
INSERT INTO geo_dst SELECT readWkt(geom) FROM geo_complex ORDER BY id;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM geo_complex WHERE geom LIKE 'LINESTRING%';
SELECT geom FROM geo_complex WHERE ST_Contains(geom, (2, 2));
SELECT distinct geom FROM geo_complex WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM geo_complex WHERE id < 3);
WITH (SELECT geom FROM geo_complex WHERE id = 1) AS polygon SELECT COUNT(*) FROM geo_complex WHERE ST_Intersects(geom, polygon);
